# <ProjectName> Project Blueprint

## 1. Product Identity

- product name
- category
- primary language
- one-line description
- positioning statement

## 2. Product Principles

- what kind of product this is
- what quality bar it should meet
- what architectural rules should stay stable

## 3. Scope Definition

- what the project is
- what it is not
- first-release boundaries

## 4. Target Users

- primary operator
- admin operator
- reviewer or external audience

## 5. Technology Stack

- frontend
- backend
- data
- orchestration
- observability
- deployment

## 6. Core Workflow

- describe the main workflow chain
- state the product center clearly

## 7. Core Domain Entities

- list primary business tables or models
- explain why each entity exists

## 8. Main Console Routes

- operator routes
- admin routes
- route purpose

## 9. MVP Feature Set

- required first-release modules
- success criteria

## 10. Future Roadmap

- phased build order

## 11. Product Guardrails

- what should be implemented now
- what should be documented instead of built immediately
